name: codex-3d-asset
description: Codex plugin for automatic Tripo-ready image-to-3D workflows with runtime dependency bootstrap, wallet-aware Tripo handoff, continuous post-image flow, widget-driven local preview, and selectable download formats.

interface.shortDescription: Generate Tripo-ready reference images in Codex, check wallet credits before handoff, keep the flow going after image generation, open a 3D preview widget, and choose the download format.
interface.longDescription: Codex plugin for 3D asset workflows. It resolves style, uses native image generation, enforces shadowless white-background references with no floor gradient or ground plane, applies front-view T-pose rules for characters, checks TRIPO_API_KEY before handoff, checks the Tripo wallet balance before paid tasks when available, asks for confirmation before spending Tripo credits unless the user explicitly wants immediate continuation, continues the conversation after image generation instead of stopping on the image alone, uses the Tripo API directly instead of browser automation, bootstraps its local MCP dependencies automatically on first launch, starts a local viewer server for plugin-scoped outputs, exposes a fullscreenable 3D preview widget, and supports selectable output download formats with glb as the default.
defaultPrompt: Create a low poly knight in a shadowless front-view T-pose on white.
Generate every low poly asset needed for a soccer match and send each one to Tripo.
Use these references to define the style, then continue to the Tripo API and download as FBX.
